scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @mr.dj2u/mercury && npm run build --workspace @mr.dj2u/mercury-ui
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @mr.dj2u/mercury && npm run build --workspace @mr.dj2u/mercury && npm run typecheck --workspace @mr.dj2u/mercury-ui
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @mr.dj2u/mercury && npm run test --workspace @mr.dj2u/mercury-ui
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
